heroTitle: Choose the right plan for your site
heroSubtitle: Start free with in-depth analysis, then pay only for the repairs and automation you need.
planFreeDescription: Perfect to understand your site's health with no commitment.
planProDescription: For growing sites that need automated repairs.
planAgentDescription: For agencies and professionals managing multiple client sites.
planBusinessDescription: For teams and organizations that need scale, control, and SLAs.
sectionTokensSubtitle: Buy token packs only when you need fixes. No monthly commitment.
tokenNoteFixUnits: Repairs use Fix Units. A minor fix uses 1 Fix Unit.
autoReplenishDescription: Automatically top up your tokens when they run low, so repairs never get interrupted.
upgradeBannerBody: You’ve spent more than the Pro plan this month. Upgrade to Pro and get unlimited repairs.
faqTokensAnswer: Tokens are used to pay for AI-powered repairs. Each repair uses a certain number of Fix Units, which consume tokens.
faqFixUnitsAnswer: A Fix Unit is a normalized cost for a repair. Minor fixes use 1 Fix Unit, more complex fixes use more.
faqSwitchPlansAnswer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings.
faqTokensExpireAnswer: Tokens do not expire within the current billing year. We’ll notify you well in advance if this changes.
